meta.title: VSON | Store
meta.description: VSON Store brings world-class household and health products to Vietnamese consumers. Premium brands: Torayvino, Zojirushi, Kingbag, Nepia. Shop online or across marketplace channels.

og.title: VSON | Store
og.description: VSON Store brings world-class household and health products to Vietnamese consumers. Premium brands: Torayvino, Zojirushi, Kingbag, Nepia.

store_hero.heading:
Premium brands.
Trusted distribution.
store_hero.sub: VSON Store brings world-class household and health products to Vietnamese consumers through our own platform and across the channels where they already shop.

brands.name: Torayvino
brands.desc: Japan's leading tap and shower water filtration brand, protecting the health of families across Vietnam.

brands.name: Zojirushi
brands.desc: Premium Japanese kitchen and home appliances, built to the highest standards of quality and longevity.

brands.name: Kingbag
brands.desc: Modern laptop backpacks and crossbody bags designed for style, function, and durability for the urban professional.

brands.name: Nepia
brands.desc: Japanese premium tissue and paper products, soft, reliable, and trusted by households across Asia.

where_to_buy.heading:
Find us on
every channel.
where_to_buy.body: Shop VSON brands on our own storefront or on your favourite marketplace, wherever it's most convenient for you.

partner.heading:
Looking for a B2C partner
in Vietnam?
partner.body: If you're a brand (local or international) seeking a trusted distribution partner to reach Vietnamese consumers, VSON Store is built for exactly that.
offers: Retail, e-commerce, and marketplace channel presence
Operational and logistics infrastructure already in place
A consumer base that trusts the VSON name
